name: Foolproof Dark Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk (14 ounces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the chocolate chips over low heat.
2. Add Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk and salt to the melted chocolate.
3. Stir in chopped nuts and vanilla extract until combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a wax paper-lined 8 or 9-inch square pan.
5. Allow the fudge to chill for 2 hours, or until firm.
6. Turn the fudge onto a cutting board and cut into squares.
